import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; const Home = () => { const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { setIsVisible(true); }, []); const freshPicks = [ { id: 1, name: 'Fresh Tomatoes', price: '₹20/kg', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/200x150/4CAF50/FFFFFF?text=Tomato', whatsappLink: 'https://wa.me/919876543210?text=I%20want%20to%20order%20Fresh%20Tomatoes' }, { id: 2, name: 'Fresh Apples', price: '₹120/kg', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/200x150/FF9800/FFFFFF?text=Apple', whatsappLink: 'https://wa.me/919876543210?text=I%20want%20to%20order%20Fresh%20Apples' }, { id: 3, name: 'Fresh Bananas', price: '₹40/dozen', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/200x150/FFC107/FFFFFF?text=Banana', whatsappLink: 'https://wa.me/919876543210?text=I%20want%20to%20order%20Fresh%20Bananas' } ]; const seasonalFruits = [ { id: 1, name: 'Mango', price: '₹80/kg', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150x150/FF6B6B/FFFFFF?text=Mango' }, { id: 2, name: 'Orange', price: '₹60/kg', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150x150/4ECDC4/FFFFFF?text=Orange' }, { id: 3, name: 'Grapes', price: '₹100/kg', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150x150/95E77E/FFFFFF?text=Grapes' }, { id: 4, name: 'Pineapple', price: '₹45/pc', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150x150/FFE66D/FFFFFF?text=Pineapple' } ]; const scrollToSection = (sectionId) => { const element = document.getElementById(sectionId); if (element) { const headerHeight = document.querySelector('header').offsetHeight; const elementPosition = element.offsetTop - headerHeight; window.scrollTo({ top: elementPosition, behavior: 'smooth' }); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
